blocks.content: Shift from micro-editing to macro-orchestration. Use "Plan Mode" to safely design and execute an AI-generated web scraping application.

items: **Open Mission Control:** Press `Cmd + E` (or `Ctrl + E`) to open the Agent Manager.
**Select Model:** Choose your AI model (e.g., Gemini 3 Pro).
**Set Mode:** Set Execution Mode to **Plan Mode**.

items.title: The Prompt:
items.content: Enter the following to begin architecture:
items.prompt: Create a basic Python script using Playwright that navigates to 'news.ycombinator.com', extracts the top 5 article titles, and saves them to a file. Enforce PEP 8 styling.

items: **Review Artifact:** The agent will generate an **Implementation Plan** instead of writing code blindly.

items.title: Iterate:
items.content: Leave a comment directly on the plan artifact to adjust the course:
items.prompt: Please update the plan to ensure the output is saved specifically as a .csv file named hacker_news.csv.

items: **Approve & Code:** Click **Approve**. The agent moves to the Coding Phase. Review the line-by-line **Code Diffs** and click **Accept**.
**Execute:** The agent will attempt to run `python3 scraper.py`. Because of our strict policies, it will pause. Click **Approve**.
